title: Forest Stream Meditation
summary: 55 BPM nature-and-music track  -  flowing water, birdsong, spacious pads and piano notes.
prompt: A nature-and-music meditation track at slow tempo (55 BPM). Gentle flowing stream water sounds, subtle birdsong layered in, soft sustained pad in a major key, occasional spacious piano notes with long reverb tails, light ambient pluck textures. Forest-clearing-at-dawn feeling. No percussion. Grounding and restorative.
